summary: Iteration 145: Pattern Intelligence Panel + Concierge Reasoning Endpoint - All 30 backend tests passed. Frontend panel verified working with all sections (Team Notifications, Recurring Issues, Guest Complaints, Asset Clusters, Outlet Drift). LLM integration via Claude Sonnet 4.5 working for both /api/patterns/stratus-recommendations and /api/concierge/reason endpoints. Window select dropdown changes days param and reloads data. No MongoDB _id leaks.

minor.issue: LLM response can take >30s causing timeout in some cases - graceful fallback to null narrative works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Pattern Intelligence backend properly uses {'_id': 0} projection to prevent MongoDB _id leaks
LLM integration in patterns.py and concierge_hub.py gracefully handles failures (returns None instead of crashing)
Frontend PatternIntelligencePanel.tsx correctly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Sidebar.tsx correctly includes 'pattern-intelligence' entry under 'Dashboard & Overview' group

verified_features.PATTERNS_recurring_issues_default: PASS - GET /api/patterns/recurring-issues returns items with room_no, category, count, sources
verified_features.PATTERNS_guest_complaints_default: PASS - GET /api/patterns/guest-complaint-history returns guests with 2+ tickets, sorted by count
verified_features.PATTERNS_asset_clusters_default: PASS - GET /api/patterns/asset-failure-clusters returns categories with count, avg_revenue_at_risk
verified_features.PATTERNS_outlet_drift: PASS - GET /api/patterns/outlet-drift returns outlets with drift > 1 min
verified_features.PATTERNS_stratus_no_llm: PASS - GET /api/patterns/stratus-recommendations?use_llm=false returns plans[] with narrative=null
verified_features.PATTERNS_stratus_with_llm: PASS - GET /api/patterns/stratus-recommendations?use_llm=true returns narrative from Claude Sonnet 4.5 (or null on timeout)
verified_features.PATTERNS_remediation_create: PASS - POST /api/patterns/remediation creates manual plan with id, manual=true
verified_features.CONCIERGE_reason_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/concierge/reason returns classification + LLM narrative
verified_features.CONCIERGE_team_notifications_list: PASS - GET /api/concierge/team-notifications returns notifications with acknowledged flag
verified_features.FRONTEND_sidebar_pattern_intelligence: PASS - 'Pattern Intelligence' appears in sidebar under 'Dashboard & Overview' group
verified_features.FRONTEND_panel_opens: PASS - Clicking sidebar item opens panel with data-testid='patterns-panel'
verified_features.FRONTEND_recurring_issues_section: PASS - Panel renders 'Recurring Issues by Room' section with data
verified_features.FRONTEND_guest_complaints_section: PASS - Panel renders 'Guest Repeat Complaints' section with data
verified_features.FRONTEND_asset_clusters_section: PASS - Panel renders 'Asset Failure Clusters' section with data
verified_features.FRONTEND_outlet_drift_section: PASS - Panel renders 'Outlet Pacing Drift' section
verified_features.FRONTEND_run_stratus_button: PASS - 'Run EchoStratus LLM' button (data-testid='run-stratus') present and clickable
verified_features.FRONTEND_window_select: PASS - Window select (data-testid='window-select') changes days param and reloads data
verified_features.SECURITY_no_id_leak_patterns: PASS - No MongoDB _id leaked in any /api/patterns/* endpoint

seed_data_creation: No new seed endpoints needed. Pattern endpoints mine existing concierge_tickets, eng_work_orders, hskp_guest_signals, foh_outlets, foh_ticket_timings, guest360_profiles collections. Created test remediation plan with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 145 adds Pattern Intelligence module: (1) Backend /api/patterns/* with 8 endpoints: recurring-issues (room+category grouping across concierge/engineering/hskp), guest-complaint-history (guests with 2+ tickets + loyalty fields), asset-failure-clusters (eng_work_orders by category with avg revenue_at_risk), outlet-drift (outlets with ticket_time_variance drift > 1 min), stratus-recommendations (deterministic plans + optional LLM narrative via Claude Sonnet 4.5), remediation (manual plan creation), remediation-log (list recent plans). (2) Concierge /reason endpoint with LLM narrative explaining routing decisions. (3) Team notifications list and ack endpoints. (4) Frontend PatternIntelligencePanel.tsx with all sections, Run EchoStratus LLM button, Refresh button, window select dropdown. Panel registered in panel-metadata.ts (line ~1725) and panel-registry.ts (line ~881). Sidebar entry in Sidebar.tsx (line ~146) under 'Dashboard & Overview' group. LLM can take 30-60s to respond - graceful fallback to null narrative if timeout.
